buildCommand: git clone https://github.com/flutter/flutter.git --depth 1 -b stable $HOME/flutter && cd recallos_web_viewer && $HOME/flutter/bin/flutter pub get && $HOME/flutter/bin/flutter build web --release --base-href / --dart-define=SUPABASE_URL=$SUPABASE_URL --dart-define=SUPABASE_ANON_KEY=$SUPABASE_ANON_KEY
